text.title: react-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Four feature-module antipatterns the spec must forbid.

antipattern.symptom: React DevTools shows tree nodes labelled "Unknown" / "<Anonymous>". Error stack traces print no recognisable component name.
antipattern.root-cause: Component is exported as `export default () => …` or `export default function () {}`. The function name binding never gets attached because the function literal is anonymous.
antipattern.fix: Replace with named function declaration: `export function Card(props: CardProps) { … }`. Spec field components[].declaration MUST equal "function-declaration".

antipattern.symptom: React.memo wrapper produces no benefit; profiler shows the memoized child re-rendering every parent render.
antipattern.root-cause: Parent passes a fresh object literal each render: `<Card style={{color:'red'}} onSelect={() => …}/>`. New reference defeats Object.is shallow comparison.
antipattern.fix: Hoist constant objects outside the component body. Wrap callbacks with useCallback (and justify in the spec's memoization field per [[react-hooks]] r6-memo-after-profile).

antipattern.symptom: Consumer code outside the provider silently returns the fake default; a bug shows up much later as wrong data in a nested view, hard to trace.
antipattern.root-cause: `createContext<AuthContextValue>({ user: null, login: noop } as AuthContextValue)` provides a usable default, hiding the missing provider.
antipattern.fix: Initialise with `createContext<AuthContextValue | null>(null)`. The useAuth hook throws if context is null naming the expected provider. Spec field context.null_sentinel MUST be true.

antipattern.symptom: The same prop is threaded through 4+ intermediate components that don't use it themselves; refactors require touching every level.
antipattern.root-cause: A piece of state lives at the feature root but the consumer is 4 levels deep. Each intermediate component forwards the prop verbatim.
antipattern.fix: Promote to a Context (layer=shared-context) OR route to an external store (layer=global-ui). Spec's state_routing MUST not contain a prop-drilled slice with depth > 2; the decision tree branches on this.
